title: Sentry Project
description: Represents a project in Sentry. Projects belong to an organization and a team, and contain issues and events for a specific application or service.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug of the project.

name.description: The human-readable name of the project.

platform.description: The platform identifier (e.g., python, javascript, react-native).

isBookmarked.description: Whether the project is bookmarked by the authenticated user.

isMember.description: Whether the authenticated user is a member of this project.

features.description: A list of feature flags enabled for this project.

firstEvent.description: The timestamp of the first event received for this project.

firstTransactionEvent.description: Whether the project has received a transaction event.

hasAccess.description: Whether the authenticated user has access to this project.

team.description: The primary team associated with this project.

teams.description: All teams that have access to this project.

organization.description: The organization this project belongs to.
